prompt: Ambient cinematic sci-fi title cue, about fifteen seconds. A lone fragile female-coded synth pad drifting over deep space, a slow swelling string bed, a single distant piano note, faint shimmer like a damaged hologram. Hopeful but wounded — the sound of waking alone far from home, a small red planet ahead. No drums, no percussion, no vocals. Soft, spacious, emotional, builds gently then settles.
